name: tokenslim
description: Input-token compressor for Claude Code and Codex. Compresses Bash, Read, Grep, and Glob tool results before they enter model context via deterministic, cache-safe heuristics.

interface.shortDescription: Compress noisy tool output before it enters Codex context
interface.longDescription: tokenslim bundles PostToolUse hooks for Bash, Read, Grep, and Glob. It uses deterministic, fail-open heuristics to reduce repeated logs, repeated reads, and large search results while preserving failing test names, errors, paths, and other high-signal details.
defaultPrompt: Compress noisy tool output in this repo
